WEEK NUMBER REFERENCE

Week Numbers 2025 — Full Calendar

Here is the complete ISO week number calendar for 2025. All 52 weeks are listed with their start date (Monday) and end date (Sunday). Week 1 of 2025 started on Monday, December 30, 2024.

Each row shows the ISO week number, the Monday it starts on, and the Sunday it ends on.

Key dates in 2025 by week number

Useful reference for planning: which ISO week do major fixed dates fall in?

DateDayISO Week
January 1, 2025WednesdayW01
February 14, 2025FridayW07
March 20, 2025 (spring equinox)ThursdayW12
June 21, 2025 (summer solstice)SaturdayW25
September 22, 2025 (autumn equinox)MondayW39
October 31, 2025FridayW44
December 21, 2025 (winter solstice)SundayW51
December 25, 2025ThursdayW52
December 31, 2025WednesdayW01 of 2026

FAQ

What week number is January 1, 2025?

January 1, 2025 falls in ISO week 1 of 2025. Week 1 started on Monday, December 30, 2024.

What week number is Christmas 2025?

December 25, 2025 (Thursday) is in ISO week 52 of 2025.

What week number is December 31, 2025?

December 31, 2025 (Wednesday) is in ISO week 1 of 2026 — the last days of December 2025 belong to the first week of 2026.

How many weeks does 2025 have?

2025 has 52 ISO weeks. The last week of 2025 (W52) ends on Sunday, December 28, 2025.

Related: ISO week number explained · How many weeks in a year? · Days in each month
